props.ChoiceText: You misstepped in ceremony and were corrected before witnesses, which taught you courtly manners faster than kindness would have.
props.ChoiceBio: A public correction taught you that etiquette is most memorable when it hurts.

0.TransitionText: Because a public correction taught you that etiquette is most memorable when it hurts, you survived by remaining useful inside the same hierarchy that humiliated you.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Squire, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a public correction taught you that etiquette is most memorable when it hurts, you learned how much power lives in bearing and timing, and that knowledge belonged at court.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a public correction taught you that etiquette is most memorable when it hurts., the setback did not end your road, and you remained in Squire.
